channel.title: Zion Tech Group — Services
channel.description: Latest AI & IT services from Zion Tech Group

item.title: No-Code AI Chatbot Builder
item.description: Draft contracts, NDAs, term sheets, and privacy policies with jurisdiction-specific clauses. Trained on actual filings from SEC, Companies House, etc.

item.title: AI Image Upscaler and Restorer
item.description: Automatically detects and redacts PII, PHI, and sensitive data in documents, PDFs, images, and transcripts. SOC2-compliant audit trail included.

item.title: AI Supply Chain Predictor
item.description: ML-based fraud detection for fintech, e-commerce, and marketplaces. Adapts to new fraud patterns within hours, not weeks.

item.title: AI Video Dubbing and Lip-Sync
item.description: Autonomous meeting agent that joins Zoom and Teams, transcribes, summarizes decisions, extracts action items with owners and due dates, and pushes to your project tools.

item.title: AI Legal Document Drafter
item.description: Deep static analysis that finds complex vulnerabilities — logic bugs, race conditions, crypto misuses — beyond traditional linters. Uses LLMs to understand intent.

item.title: AI Document Redaction and PII Removal
item.description: Clone any voice with full emotional control — happiness, sadness, anger, urgency — for audiobooks, games, and accessibility. Supports 40+ languages and real-time modulation.

item.title: Real-Time Fraud Detection Engine
item.description: Automated cost governance for AWS, Azure, and GCP. Right-sizes resources, eliminates waste, and enforces budgets with predictive alerts before overspend.

item.title: AI Meeting Intelligence Suite
item.description: Proactively test system resilience by injecting failures — VM kill, network latency, dependency outage — in production-like environments. Improve reliability before incidents happen.

item.title: AI Code Audit and Security Scanner
item.description: Track and optimize carbon footprint across your IT estate — data centers, cloud workloads, employee devices, and network. Set reduction targets and auto-generate ESG reports.

item.title: Emotional Voice Cloning Studio
item.description: Deploy and manage containerized workloads on distributed edge nodes — factories, retail stores, telco sites. Unified control plane with zero-touch provisioning.

item.title: Cloud Cost Optimization Platform
item.description: Evaluate your cryptographic infrastructure against future quantum threats. We inventory all PKI assets, identify vulnerable algorithms, and produce a migration roadmap to post-quantum cryptography.

item.title: Chaos Engineering as a Service
item.description: Enterprise IT service: Unified Communications & Collaboration Platform. Robust, scalable, secure.

item.title: IT Sustainability Dashboard
item.description: Enterprise IT service: Wireless Network Design & Optimization. Robust, scalable, secure.

item.title: Edge Computing Deployment and Ops
item.description: Enterprise IT service: Low-Code Integration Platform as a Service. Robust, scalable, secure.

item.title: Quantum Readiness Assessment
item.description: Enterprise IT service: API Gateway & Developer Portal. Robust, scalable, secure.
